arts.ttl: Paul Scholes points finger at Sir Alex Ferguson for his 'excuse' for brutal Man Utd snub
arts.sum: Paul Scholes has hinted at there being another reason for Sir Alex Ferguson's ruthless sale of Jaap Stam beyond the former Manchester United defender's decision to publish an autobiography

arts.ttl: Manchester United can correct Erling Haaland transfer mistake with Champions League scouting plan
arts.sum: Manchester United failed to sign Erling Haaland from Molde and then Red Bull Salzburg

arts.ttl: INEOS BANNED after Man Utd decision
arts.sum: However, with both Nice and Man Utd qualifying for this season's Europa League, INEOS' ownership has led to some complications. The outlet reports that Nice have de facto become an independent club again as INEOS have been barred from making any contact with the Ligue 1 side.

arts.ttl: Man United vs FC Twente - Europa League: Live score, team news and updates as Erik ten Hag takes on his former side as a player in their opening European tie
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Manchester United take on FC Twente in their opening game of the new Europa League competition at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Report: Manchester United want to sign £96.3m striker who is 'better' than Haaland but Arsenal are favourites
Kobbie Mainoo and Amad Diallo 'Set for New Deals' at Man Utd
arts.sum: Manchester United duo Kobbie Mainoo and Amad Diallo are on course to be rewarded with fresh terms

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs FC Twente LIVE! Europa League match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction
arts.sum: Red Devils meet Erik ten Hag’s former club in first game of new-look competition

arts.ttl: Romelu Lukaku stops Victor Osimhen joining Man Utd
arts.sum: Romelu Lukaku ’s brutal form for Chelsea was a key reason why Manchester United opted against moving for Victor Osimhen this summer. Signing Osimhen, who wanted to move to the Premier League and had enjoyed a prolific spell at Napoli and led them to a historic Scudetto in 2023, seemed like a no-brainer for United.

arts.ttl: Man Utd issue update on highly-rated wonderkid who played first game for nine months
arts.sum: Attacking midfielder Dan Gore returned to action for Manchester United's U-21 team on Tuesday night after recovering from freak shoulder injury sustained in January

arts.ttl: Man Utd preparing for new contract talks with Mainoo and Diallo
arts.sum: Manchester United are preparing to discuss new contracts for key duo Kobbie Mainoo and Amad Diallo, Sky Sports News can reveal.
